title: ModelHasRoles (spatie pivot, augmented)
description: Spatie's shipped `model_has_roles` polymorphic pivot augmented with denormalised (application_id, tenant_id) + `assigned_by`, `assigned_at`, `expires_at` for the time-bounded assignment surface. Polymorphic to User / PlatformUser / ServiceAccount. Every write enforces role.guard_name === principal's guard + role.application_id === principal.application_id (for User principals).

x-eloquent.note: Spatie-managed pivot — no dedicated Eloquent model. Consumed via HasRoles trait on each principal (`->assignRole()`, `->syncRoles()`, `->roles`). Our observer attaches for enforcement + audit + cache invalidation.

x-database.description: Spatie ships the pivot with columns (role_id, model_type, model_id). Our migration ADDS (application_id, tenant_id, assigned_by, assigned_at, expires_at, audit columns).

application_id.description: Denormalised from role.application_id. Observer enforces role.application_id === principal.application_id for User principals.

assigned_by.description: The actor who granted the assignment. NULL = system-seeded (TenantDefaultRoleSeeder).

assigned_at.description: Snapshot of the assignment moment. Separate from created_at because a re-assignment (revoke + re-grant) shows two distinct assigned_at values in the audit trail.

expires_at.description: When set, PurgeExpiredRoleAssignmentsJob deletes the row at expires_at + fires RoleAssignmentExpired. Requires the `time_bounded_role_assignments` entitlement. Framework ceiling: config('rbac.assignments.max_time_bounded_duration_days') (default 365).

indexes.name: model_has_roles_pkey
indexes.description: Composite primary key — one role assignment per principal.

indexes.name: model_has_roles_principal_idx
indexes.description: Reverse lookup: given a principal, what roles hold?

x-wire.note: Wire projection on the `GET /rbac/principals/{principal}/roles` endpoint returns { role_id, role_name, role_label, assigned_by, assigned_at, expires_at, is_expiring_soon }.
